\\c[1]This battle is a little different: \c[1]This battle is a little different than the ones before it. Would you like a tutorial?\|
\\c[1]Nymiera and Vitus have started an: \c[1]Nymiera and Vitus have started an all out real-time war in Hiyoshi City.
\\c[1]You will engage in a 3-Round battl: \c[1]You will engage in a 3-Round battle to the death.
\\c[1]Unlike past minigames, this battle: \c[1]Unlike past minigames, this battle is a \c[6]real-time battle!
\\c[1]You may attack as many times as yo: \c[1]You may attack as many times as you want as long as you have the gauge bar requirement for that attack.
\\c[1]The blue bar above Nymiera's HP ba: \c[1]The blue bar above Nymiera's HP bar, and the red bar above Vitus' HP bar are their respective gauge bars.
\\c[1]Both gauge bars will passively inc: \c[1]Both gauge bars will passively increase every 2 seconds.
\\c[1]When using a move, the time it tak: \c[1]When using a move, the time it takes for the bar to generate gauge increases to 2.5 seconds, so please do not spam.
\\c[1]The moves at Nymiera's disposal an: \c[1]The moves at Nymiera's disposal and their costs are displayed at the bottom left of the screen.
\\c[1]If you wish to know what these mov: \c[1]If you wish to know what these moves do in more detail, you may press the [X] button on the keyboard to pause the fight.
\\c[1]Note that the gauge bar will not p: \c[1]Note that the gauge bar will not passively generate gauge during this menu. Do not cheat.
\\c[1]Finally, for the third bar on both: \c[1]Finally, for the third bar on both Nymiera's and Vitus' side.
\\c[1]These are their Ultimate Bars. Eve: \c[1]These are their Ultimate Bars. Every time you use a move, the bar will generate one point.
\\c[1]When the bar is full, each charact: \c[1]When the bar is full, each character may activate their ultimate for devastating results.
\\c[1]Please make sure to prioritize get: \c[1]Please make sure to prioritize getting your ult before the enemy does.

\\c[1]This is the final battle. There's: \c[1]This is the final battle. There's some information you may want to know.
\\c[1]Fine, then. I'll leave since I'm s: \c[1]Fine, then. I'll leave since I'm so useless.
\\c[1]During this final battle, Nymiera: \c[1]During this final battle, Nymiera and Vitus have achieved their enlightened forms.
\\c[1]In this state, attacks on both sid: \c[1]In this state, attacks on both side have been powered up.
\\c[1]In addition, using attacks won't c: \c[1]In addition, using attacks won't consume gauge bars. Both parties aren't able to cast their ultimates or auras either.
\\c[1]Though, to be honest... It looks l: \c[1]Though, to be honest... It looks like Vitus is kind of going berserk.

\\c[1]Over time, Nymiera will lose healt: \c[1]Over time, Nymiera will lose health. Attacking will restore health, but it won't be enough to save you in the long run.
\\c[1]Remember when I said spamming was: \c[1]Remember when I said spamming was bad? Well, for this part, I take it back.

NYMIERA: (If that falls on top of Hiyosh: NYMIERA: (If that falls on top of Hiyoshi... Aevium is done for...

We are programmed so that we are unable: We are programmed so that we are unable to kill each other.
\\c[6]But we can still push each other t: \c[6]But we can still push each other to the brink of it.

My tree of life, and your cocoon of deat: My tree of life, and your cocoon of death.
This happens to us involuntarily-- We ca: This happens to us involuntarily-- We cannot control it.
But even this process takes energy that: But even this process takes energy that is passively stored.

That's why I attacked you. You realized: That's why I attacked you. You realized that you needed to help or else you would turn into your cocoon.
And if that were to happen... It wouldn': And if that were to happen... It wouldn't survive the explosion.
So I forced you to make a choice.
VITUS: Save the city, or die from my own: VITUS: Save the city, or die from my own scheme.

I put everything into worshipping my God: I put everything into worshipping my God. Just to learn that it was just another person.
The rulers of the 7 Kingdoms, save for u: The rulers of the 7 Kingdoms, save for us, were all fragments of this Arceus.
Queen Griselda, Queen Stella and Trinity: Queen Griselda, Queen Stella and Trinity, Princess Kasumi, King Ieisel, King Theis, and Lord Rumeo.
VITUS: That is why I started that war. I: VITUS: That is why I started that war. I wanted to ruin all pieces of our so called "God".

If life went on without it, I probably w: If life went on without it, I probably would have disregarded the rest.
